The HashMap provides O(1) average-case lookup by distributing keys across buckets using a hash function
The function accepts a mutable reference to the vector and appends the new element at the end
TCP uses a three-way handshake to establish a connection between client and server

The garbage collector runs in a separate thread and pauses application threads during the mark phase
B-tree indexes maintain sorted data and allow searches, sequential access, insertions, and deletions in logarithmic time

DNS resolution translates human-readable domain names into IP addresses using a hierarchical lookup
The observer pattern defines a one-to-many dependency between objects so that when one changes state, all dependents are notified
The circuit breaker opens after three consecutive failures and resets after a 30-second timeout
UTF-8 encoding uses one to four bytes per character, with ASCII characters occupying a single byte

The copy-on-write mechanism defers duplication of data until a write operation occurs
